title: Lack of Audit Logging
description: The absence of information regarding audit logging practices creates a significant risk of repudiation. Without detailed logs of user actions, system events, and data modifications, it becomes impossible to trace back malicious activities or determine accountability in case of a security incident.
attack_vector: Malicious actors can operate with impunity, making it difficult to identify and prosecute them.
mitigations: Implement comprehensive audit logging of all critical system events.
Securely store audit logs and regularly review them for suspicious activity.
Establish clear accountability procedures and processes.
